top_signals.title: Policy paper: HM Treasury Market Engagement Group
top_signals.summary: A senior‑level forum for financial market participants to share their views on UK-related developments in financial markets, including gilts and sterling, and broader market themes with the Chancellor of the Exchequer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: German, Spanish FCAS companies rally to preserve breakthrough fighter tech
top_signals.summary: With existing FCAS contracts ending this year, the companies want the government to keep spending money on a sixth-generation warplane.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All Time
top_signals.summary: SpaceX has made history with the biggest-ever IPO, launching it into the top ranks of the largest public companies and putting founder Elon Musk on the verge of becoming the world’s first trillionaire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: Interview with Het Financieele Dagblad
Correspondence: DAO 04/26 Tax Arrangements
top_signals.summary: ‘Dear Accounting Officer’ letters provide advice on accountability, regularity, propriety, value for money and annual accounting exercises.

top_signals.title: Bancone is a pasta restaurant – just don’t call it Italian
top_signals.summary: A new restaurant below the imposing walls of the Bank of England is serving pasta – just don’t call this Italian food. I’m told the rare breed beef and marrowbone pasta is a British dish. Is a restaurant Italian because they serve pasta? As any City worker will know, Bancone’s silken threads are kneaded in the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CISA to require federal agencies to patch some cyber vulnerabilities within 3 days
top_signals.summary: CISA is giving agencies 180 days to adopt the new patching time frame, according to a directive released Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: DOJ charges two in $389 million AudiA6 crypto laundering case
top_signals.summary: DOJ charges two men over alleged AudiA6 crypto laundering service tied to more than $389 million in transactions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ETH futures traders lean into $1.6K range lows: Will Ether lead market recovery?
top_signals.summary: ETH traders increased their long positions as Ether price traded near 2026 lows. Will ETH’s rebound eclipse the BTC recovery?
